165.description: AppalReD Legal Aid provides free civil legal services to low-income and vulnerable residents across 37 Appalachian counties in Eastern and South-Central Kentucky—including Bell, Clay, Floyd, Harlan, Knox, Laurel, Letcher, Perry, Pike, and 28 others. Handles expungement, housing, public benefits, family law, and disaster-related legal issues. Seniors may qualify regardless of income. Central intake required before field offices can assist.
165.description_es: AppalReD Legal Aid ofrece servicios legales civiles gratuitos a residentes de bajos ingresos y vulnerables en 37 condados apalaches del este y centro-sur de Kentucky—incluidos Bell, Clay, Floyd, Harlan, Knox, Laurel, Letcher, Perry, Pike y 28 más. Maneja eliminación de antecedentes, vivienda, beneficios públicos, derecho familiar y asuntos legales por desastres. Personas mayores pueden calificar sin importar ingresos.
165.notes: Central intake: 1-866-277-5733. Apply online at ardfky.org. If court date within 3 business days, call intake immediately—do not use online form. Disaster legal hotline: 1-844-478-0099.
165.notes_es: Ingreso central: 1-866-277-5733. Solicite en línea en ardfky.org. Si tiene corte en 3 días hábiles, llame de inmediato. Línea legal por desastres: 1-844-478-0099.
165.hours: Central intake Mon–Fri during business hours
165.services: Free civil legal services|Expungement assistance|Housing and eviction defense|Public benefits appeals|Family law|Disaster legal services|Senior legal assistance

166.description: The ACLU of Kentucky's ROVR (Restoration of Voting Rights) campaign helps Kentuckians with past felony convictions understand and exercise their voting rights. Under Governor Beshear's 2019 executive order, non-violent Kentucky state felony convictions are automatically restored upon completion of the full sentence including probation and parole. ACLU provides registration resources, eligibility guidance, and advocacy—violent offenses, federal convictions, and out-of-state felonies require a separate restoration application.
166.description_es: La campaña ROVR de ACLU de Kentucky ayuda a ciudadanos con condenas previas a entender y ejercer sus derechos de voto. Bajo la orden ejecutiva de 2019, condenas por delitos graves no violentos del estado de Kentucky se restauran automáticamente al completar la sentencia incluyendo libertad condicional. ACLU ofrece recursos de registro y orientación—delitos violentos, condenas federales y de otros estados requieren solicitud separada.
166.notes: Automatic restoration applies to completed non-violent Kentucky STATE felony sentences only. Does not restore firearm rights. Register to vote at vrsws.sos.ky.gov after eligibility confirmed.
166.notes_es: Restauración automática aplica solo a sentencias completadas por delitos graves no violentos del ESTADO de Kentucky. No restaura derechos de armas. Regístrese en vrsws.sos.ky.gov después de confirmar elegibilidad.
166.hours: Online resources; office Mon–Fri business hours
166.services: Voting rights education|ROVR eligibility guidance|Voter registration resources|Civil rights advocacy

167.description: Kentucky's official Civil Rights Restoration program administers voting rights for people with felony convictions. Non-violent Kentucky state felony convictions are automatically restored when the full sentence is complete—including probation and parole. Those with violent felonies, treason, election bribery, human trafficking, or federal/out-of-state convictions must submit a free application to the Governor. Check eligibility online or contact DOC restoration staff.
167.description_es: El programa oficial de Restauración de Derechos Civiles de Kentucky administra derechos de voto para personas con condenas por delitos graves. Condenas no violentas del estado se restauran automáticamente al completar la sentencia—incluyendo libertad condicional. Quienes tienen delitos violentos, traición, soborno electoral, trata de personas o condenas federales/de otro estado deben enviar solicitud gratuita al Gobernador.
167.notes: Check 'Can You Vote?' tool at civilrightsrestoration.ky.gov. Application available through Probation & Parole offices or online. Must have no pending charges, warrants, or outstanding restitution for manual restoration.
167.notes_es: Use la herramienta 'Can You Vote?' en civilrightsrestoration.ky.gov. Solicitud disponible en oficinas de Probation & Parole o en línea. No debe tener cargos pendientes ni restitución pendiente para restauración manual.
167.services: Voting rights eligibility screening|Civil rights restoration applications|Automatic restoration verification|Probation and Parole application assistance

168.description: Kentucky Equal Justice Center (KEJC) is a public-interest law and advocacy organization serving all of Kentucky. Works on poverty law issues affecting returning citizens including wage theft, Medicaid access, housing, and occupational licensing barriers. Operates the Maxwell Street Legal Clinic in Lexington and partners on voter registration drives for people restoring civil rights. Does not replace full-service legal aid for individual cases—contact regional legal aid for case representation.
168.description_es: Kentucky Equal Justice Center (KEJC) es una organización de abogacía e interés público que sirve a todo Kentucky. Trabaja en temas de derecho de pobreza que afectan a ciudadanos en reinserción, incluyendo robo de salarios, acceso a Medicaid, vivienda y barreras de licencias ocupacionales. Opera la Maxwell Street Legal Clinic en Lexington.
168.notes: Maxwell Street Legal Clinic serves Lexington area. For individual civil legal cases, contact AppalReD, Legal Aid of the Bluegrass, Legal Aid Society, or Kentucky Legal Aid based on your county.
168.notes_es: Maxwell Street Legal Clinic sirve el área de Lexington. Para casos legales civiles individuales, contacte la organización de legal aid de su condado.
168.services: Poverty law advocacy|Policy litigation|Voter registration partnerships|Maxwell Street Legal Clinic|Systemic barrier advocacy

169.description: Jefferson County Drug Court is a certified specialty court offering intensive supervised treatment as an alternative to incarceration for non-violent offenders with substance use disorders. Felony track requires a minimum of 18 months. Entry requires referral through the court system—a judge, prosecutor, defense attorney, or probation officer must initiate. Sessions held at the Jefferson County Judicial Center. Successful completion may result in reduced charges or dismissal.
169.description_es: El Tribunal de Drogas del Condado de Jefferson es un tribunal especial certificado que ofrece tratamiento supervisado intensivo como alternativa al encarcelamiento para infractores no violentos con trastornos por uso de sustancias. La pista de delitos graves requiere mínimo 18 meses. La entrada requiere referido del sistema judicial—juez, fiscal, defensor o agente de libertad condicional.
169.notes: Referral required—cannot self-enroll. Ask your attorney or probation officer about Drug Court eligibility. Statewide Specialty Courts info: (502) 573-2350 or specialtycourts@kycourts.net.
169.notes_es: Se requiere referido—no puede inscribirse solo. Pregunte a su abogado o agente de libertad condicional sobre elegibilidad. Información estatal: (502) 573-2350.
169.hours: Court sessions during business hours; schedule set by Drug Court coordinator
169.services: Supervised substance use treatment|Alternative to incarceration|Judicial case management|Recovery-oriented sentencing|Potential charge reduction upon completion

170.description: Jefferson County Veterans Treatment Court (VTC), Kentucky's first VTC launched in 2012, is a voluntary specialty court for veterans with substance use or serious mental illness charges. Requires regular court appearances, treatment compliance, and peer mentor support through partnership with Robley Rex VA Medical Center. Accepts felony and misdemeanor cases from Jefferson County Circuit and District Courts. Referral through court system—contact VTC liaison or VA Justice Outreach team.
170.description_es: El Tribunal de Tratamiento para Veteranos (VTC) del Condado de Jefferson, el primero de Kentucky desde 2012, es un tribunal especial voluntario para veteranos con cargos por uso de sustancias o enfermedad mental grave. Requiere comparecencias regulares, cumplimiento del tratamiento y apoyo de mentores a través del VA Robley Rex. Acepta casos graves y menores. Referido a través del sistema judicial.
170.notes: VA Robley Rex Justice Outreach: (502) 287-4000. Eligibility inquiries: ctaylor@louisvilleprosecutor.com. Veterans Crisis Line: call 988, press 1.
170.notes_es: VA Robley Rex Justice Outreach: (502) 287-4000. Consultas de elegibilidad: ctaylor@louisvilleprosecutor.com. Línea de crisis para veteranos: 988, presione 1.
170.hours: Court and staffing meetings during business hours
170.services: Veterans specialty court programming|VA treatment coordination|Peer mentor support|Substance use and mental health treatment compliance|Alternative sentencing for veterans

171.description: Fayette County operates four certified Drug Court programs (District and Circuit tracks) serving residents with substance use disorders as an alternative to incarceration. Programs include judicial supervision, treatment compliance, drug testing, and recovery support. Access is through the court system only—prosecutors, defense attorneys, or judges refer eligible defendants. Contact the Fayette County Attorney's Specialty Courts division for program information.
171.description_es: El Condado de Fayette opera cuatro programas certificados de Tribunal de Drogas (pistas de Distrito y Circuito) para residentes con trastornos por uso de sustancias como alternativa al encarcelamiento. Incluyen supervisión judicial, cumplimiento del tratamiento, pruebas de drogas y apoyo de recuperación. El acceso es solo a través del sistema judicial.
171.notes: Referral through Fayette County court system required. Sessions at Robert F. Stephens Courthouse Complex, 150 North Limestone. Statewide Drug Court serves all 120 counties—see kycourts.gov for other counties.
171.notes_es: Se requiere referido del sistema judicial del Condado de Fayette. Sesiones en Robert F. Stephens Courthouse Complex, 150 North Limestone.
171.services: Certified Drug Court programs|Judicial supervision|Treatment compliance monitoring|Alternative to incarceration|Recovery support services

172.description: The Kentucky Court of Justice Specialty Courts directory is the statewide resource for finding Drug Courts, Veterans Treatment Courts, Mental Health Courts, and Family Recovery Courts in all 120 counties. Drug Court has served Kentucky since 1996 as a pilot program. Contact the Department of Specialty Courts for local office information, referral processes, and the Order Referring to Specialty Court form required to begin the referral process.
172.description_es: El directorio de Tribunales Especiales del Tribunal de Justicia de Kentucky es el recurso estatal para encontrar Tribunales de Drogas, Tribunales de Tratamiento para Veteranos, Tribunales de Salud Mental y Tribunales de Recuperación Familiar en los 120 condados. Contacte al Departamento de Tribunales Especiales para información local y procesos de referido.
172.notes: Referral requires Order Referring to Specialty Court submitted to local office. Department address: 1001 Vandalay Drive, Frankfort. Complaints: specialtycourts@kycourts.net or fax (502) 782-8700.
172.notes_es: El referido requiere Orden de Referido al Tribunal Especial presentada a la oficina local. Quejas: specialtycourts@kycourts.net.
172.services: Statewide specialty court directory|Local Drug Court referrals|Veterans Treatment Court information|Mental Health Court information|Referral form guidance

180.description: Apply for SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program/food stamps) through Kentucky's kynect portal, by phone, or at any DCBS office in all 120 counties. Kentucky has lifted the lifetime ban on SNAP for people with drug-related felony convictions—you may remain eligible if you meet requirements under KRS 205.2005. Benefits loaded on EBT card. Also use kynect for Medicaid and other benefits in one application.
180.description_es: Solicite SNAP (Programa de Asistencia Nutricional Suplementaria/tarjetas de alimentos) a través del portal kynect, por teléfono o en cualquier oficina del DCBS en los 120 condados. Kentucky eliminó la prohibición de por vida de SNAP para condenas por delitos de drogas—puede seguir siendo elegible bajo KRS 205.2005. Beneficios en tarjeta EBT.
180.notes: Drug felony ban lifted in Kentucky—eligibility depends on meeting KRS 205.2005 requirements, not automatic. Apply at any county DCBS office or online. Same kynect portal as Medicaid and KTAP.
180.notes_es: Prohibición por delitos de drogas eliminada en Kentucky—elegibilidad depende de cumplir KRS 205.2005. Solicite en cualquier oficina DCBS o en línea.
180.hours: Online 24/7; DCBS offices Mon–Fri business hours
180.services: SNAP food assistance applications|EBT card benefits|Drug felony eligibility under KRS 205.2005|Combined benefits application with Medicaid|DCBS office referrals

181.description: Dare to Care Food Bank is Louisville and Kentuckiana's primary community food bank, partnering with 320+ food pantries, soup kitchens, and meal programs across 13 counties in Kentucky and Southern Indiana (including Jefferson, Oldham, Shelby, Bullitt, Henry, Spencer, and Trimble). Use their online pantry locator by address or zip code to find the nearest free food resource. No referral required for most partner pantries.
181.description_es: Dare to Care Food Bank es el banco de alimentos comunitario principal de Louisville y Kentuckiana, asociado con más de 320 despensas, comedores y programas de comidas en 13 condados de Kentucky e Indiana del Sur. Use su localizador en línea por dirección o código postal para encontrar el recurso alimentario gratuito más cercano.
181.notes: Use pantry locator at daretocare.org/get-help—enter zip code for nearest partner sites. Dare to Care distributes to pantries; most locations are partner churches and community organizations with their own hours.
181.notes_es: Use el localizador en daretocare.org/get-help—ingrese código postal para sitios aliados más cercanos. Dare to Care distribuye a despensas; la mayoría son iglesias y organizaciones comunitarias con horarios propios.
181.hours: Warehouse Mon–Fri; partner pantry hours vary—check locator
181.services: Food pantry network|Online pantry locator|Emergency food distribution|Partner agency network|Community meal program referrals

182.description: God's Pantry Food Bank serves 50 counties across Central and Eastern Kentucky through 500+ partner food pantries and meal programs. Use godspantry.org/help to find the closest pantry or meal site by map—includes Lexington, Richmond, and rural Eastern Kentucky communities. Part of the Feeding Kentucky network. No single intake office for food—locator connects you directly to partner sites.
182.description_es: God's Pantry Food Bank sirve 50 condados del centro y este de Kentucky a través de más de 500 despensas y programas de comidas aliados. Use godspantry.org/help para encontrar la despensa o comedor más cercano por mapa—incluye Lexington, Richmond y comunidades rurales del este. Parte de la red Feeding Kentucky.
182.notes: Pantry locator: godspantry.org/help. Partner site hours and requirements vary. Food donations accepted at Lexington warehouse and Kroger blue barrels in Fayette County.
182.notes_es: Localizador de despensas: godspantry.org/help. Horarios y requisitos varían por sitio aliado.
182.hours: Partner pantry hours vary; use online locator
182.services: Food pantry network across 50 counties|Online pantry and meal locator|Emergency food distribution|Partner agency coordination|Senior and child nutrition programs

183.description: Feeding America Kentucky's Heartland distributes more than 11 million pounds of food annually through 242 partner agencies across 42 counties in central, southern, and western Kentucky—including Hardin, Warren, Daviess, and surrounding areas. Use their online county search tool to find food pantries and distribution sites near you. Headquartered in Elizabethtown.
183.description_es: Feeding America Kentucky's Heartland distribuye más de 11 millones de libras de alimentos anualmente a través de 242 agencias aliadas en 42 condados del centro, sur y oeste de Kentucky—incluidos Hardin, Warren, Daviess y áreas circundantes. Use su herramienta de búsqueda por condado para encontrar despensas cercanas.
183.notes: County search at feedingamericaky.org/find-help. Partner listings subject to change—call agency before visiting. Serves Elizabethtown, Bowling Green, Owensboro, and surrounding rural counties.
183.notes_es: Búsqueda por condado en feedingamericaky.org/find-help. Listados pueden cambiar—llame antes de visitar.
183.hours: Partner agency hours vary; call (270) 769-6997 for assistance
183.services: Regional food bank distribution|County-based pantry locator|242 partner agency network|Emergency food assistance|Rural community food access

184.description: Feeding America's national food bank locator helps find food pantries, soup kitchens, and meal programs anywhere in Kentucky by zip code. Kentucky's seven regional food banks (Dare to Care, God's Pantry, Feeding America KY Heartland, Facing Hunger, Tri-State, Freestore, and others) cover all 120 counties through local partner agencies. Free tool—enter your zip code to see nearby options.
184.description_es: El localizador nacional de bancos de alimentos de Feeding America ayuda a encontrar despensas, comedores y programas de comidas en cualquier lugar de Kentucky por código postal. Los siete bancos de alimentos regionales de Kentucky cubren los 120 condados a través de agencias aliadas locales. Herramienta gratuita—ingrese su código postal.
184.notes: Also try regional locators: daretocare.org/get-help (Louisville area), godspantry.org/help (Central/Eastern KY), feedingamericaky.org/find-help (42 western/central counties). Dial 2-1-1 for live navigation help.
184.notes_es: También pruebe localizadores regionales: daretocare.org (Louisville), godspantry.org/help (centro/este), feedingamericaky.org (oeste/centro). Marque 2-1-1 para ayuda en vivo.
184.hours: Online locator 24/7; pantry hours vary by site
184.services: National food bank search by zip code|Links to regional Kentucky food banks|Pantry and meal program directory|Emergency food resource navigation
